questions.question_text_full: Select the figure from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.
questions.notes: The page displays a question numbered 12, but the options provided in the image are labeled a, b, c, d instead of 1, 2, 3, 4. Additionally, the fourth option is missing from the visual layout.

warnings: Question 12 options are labeled a, b, c, d in the source image, not 1, 2, 3, 4.
The fourth option for question 12 is not visible on the page.
The first puzzle at the top of the page lacks a question number and standard answer options.
